debug_info.goal:
case cons
α : Type u_1
l1✝ l2✝ : List α
x : α
l₁✝ l₂✝ : List α
l1 : l₁✝.Perm l₂✝
l2 :
  ∀ {idx1 : Fin l₁✝.length} {idx2 : Fin l₂✝.length},
    l₁✝[idx1] = l₂✝[idx2] → (l₁✝.eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm (l₂✝.eraseIdx ↑idx2)
⊢ ∀ {idx1 : Fin (x :: l₁✝).length} {idx2 : Fin (x :: l₂✝).length},
    (x :: l₁✝)[idx1] = (x :: l₂✝)[idx2] → ((x :: l₁✝).eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm ((x :: l₂✝).eraseIdx ↑idx2)

proof:
rename_i l₁ l₂
          have aux : ∀ (ll : List α) (i : Nat) (hi : i < ll.length), ll.Perm (ll[i] :: ll.eraseIdx i) := by
            intro ll i hi
            induction ll generalizing i with
            | nil => contradiction
            | cons hd tl ih =>
              cases i with
              | zero => simp [List.eraseIdx]
              | succ i' =>
                simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
                have hi' : i' < tl.length := by simp [List.length_cons] at hi; omega
                exact (List.Perm.cons _ (ih i' hi')).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          intro ⟨ idx1v, hi ⟩ ⟨ idx2v, hj ⟩ heq
          cases idx1v with
          | zero =>
            cases idx2v with
            | zero => simp [List.eraseIdx] at heq ⊢; exact l1
            | succ j =>
              simp [List.eraseIdx] at heq ⊢
              have hj' : j < l₂.length := by simp [List.length_cons] at hj; omega
              rw [heq]
              exact l1.trans (aux l₂ j hj')
          | succ i =>
            cases idx2v with
            | zero =>
              simp [List.eraseIdx] at heq ⊢
              have hi' : i < l₁.length := by simp [List.length_cons] at hi; omega
              rw [← heq]
              exact (aux l₁ i hi').symm.trans l1
            | succ j =>
              simp [List.eraseIdx] at heq ⊢
              have hi' : i < l₁.length := by simp [List.length_cons] at hi; omega
              have hj' : j < l₂.length := by simp [List.length_cons] at hj; omega
              exact l2 (idx1 := ⟨i, hi'⟩) (idx2 := ⟨j, hj'⟩) heq
successful_attempts:
rename_i l₁ l₂
          have aux : ∀ (ll : List α) (i : Nat) (hi : i < ll.length), ll.Perm (ll[i] :: ll.eraseIdx i) := by
            intro ll i hi
            induction ll generalizing i with
            | nil => contradiction
            | cons hd tl ih =>
              cases i with
              | zero => simp [List.eraseIdx]
              | succ i' =>
                simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
                have hi' : i' < tl.length := by simp [List.length_cons] at hi; omega
                exact (List.Perm.cons _ (ih i' hi')).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          intro ⟨ idx1v, hi ⟩ ⟨ idx2v, hj ⟩ heq
          cases idx1v with
          | zero =>
            cases idx2v with
            | zero => simp [List.eraseIdx] at heq ⊢; exact l1
            | succ j =>
              simp [List.eraseIdx] at heq ⊢
              have hj' : j < l₂.length := by simp [List.length_cons] at hj; omega
              rw [heq]
              exact l1.trans (aux l₂ j hj')
          | succ i =>
            cases idx2v with
            | zero =>
              simp [List.eraseIdx] at heq ⊢
              have hi' : i < l₁.length := by simp [List.length_cons] at hi; omega
              rw [← heq]
              exact (aux l₁ i hi').symm.trans l1
            | succ j =>
              simp [List.eraseIdx] at heq ⊢
              have hi' : i < l₁.length := by simp [List.length_cons] at hi; omega
              have hj' : j < l₂.length := by simp [List.length_cons] at hj; omega
              exact l2 (idx1 := ⟨i, hi'⟩) (idx2 := ⟨j, hj'⟩) heq
